founder.name: Narayani Kunwar Adhikari
founder.title: Founder & Director
founder.bio: Narayani Kunwar Adhikari is a dedicated special education professional with extensive experience working with children with autism in Nepal. She served as an autism teacher and head of the sensory department at SERC (2013-2016), then as a Rehabilitation Therapist at Butwal Autism Care Society (2023-2025), and most recently as a Communication Facilitator at Autism Care Center Rupandehi (2025-2026). In March 2026, she founded Siddhartha Autism Care Center to continue her mission of providing specialized, compassionate support to children on the autism spectrum and their families.

content.hero_title: Compassionate Care for Children with Autism
content.hero_subtitle: Newly established in March 2026, providing specialized therapy, education, and family support for children on the autism spectrum in Rupandehi, Nepal.
content.mission: To provide comprehensive, compassionate care and evidence-based therapies for children with autism in Nepal, ensuring every child has access to the support they need to reach their full potential.
content.about_body: Siddhartha Autism Care Center was established in March 2026 (2082/12/08 BS) to address the critical need for specialized autism services in the Rupandehi region. As a newly founded center, we are committed to providing individualized therapy programs, educational support, and family counseling to help children with autism develop essential skills and thrive in their communities. Our dedicated team works closely with families to create personalized care plans that celebrate each child's unique strengths.

programs.title: Early Intervention
programs.description: Intensive, play-based therapy sessions designed to support communication, social skills, and daily routines during the critical developmental window.

programs.title: School Readiness
programs.description: Bridging the gap between therapy and mainstream schooling through structured academic readiness, peer interaction, and self-regulation skills.

programs.title: Life Skills
programs.description: Practical independence training covering personal hygiene, community navigation, vocational exploration, and social communication for adolescents.

programs.title: Family Support
programs.description: Workshops, counseling, and a parent network to equip families with strategies, respite resources, and a community that truly understands.

testimonials.name: Early Supporter
testimonials.quote: We are so grateful to have Siddhartha Autism Care Center opening in our community. This specialized support has been greatly needed in Rupandehi, and we look forward to the positive impact it will bring to families.

testimonials.name: Local Family
testimonials.quote: Finally, there is a dedicated center for autism care in our region. The compassionate approach and professional setup of Siddhartha Autism Care Center gives us hope for our child's future.

testimonials.name: Tilottama Resident
testimonials.quote: The establishment of Siddhartha Autism Care Center is a wonderful development for our community. Such specialized services are essential, and we are excited to see this center serve families in need.
